instructions.name: admin_update_player_stats
docs: Admin-only: directly update player stats. For gameplay use `update_player_stats_cpi`.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Admin authority — must match namespace_config.authority

accounts.name: owner
docs: The player's wallet (used for PDA derivation, does not need to sign)

instructions.name: advance_action_slot
docs: Advance to the next action slot (called when roll succeeds)

instructions.name: close_player
docs: Close a dead player account and reclaim its rent to the owner.
Shared inventory is wallet-scoped and intentionally not touched here.

instructions.name: create_inventory_for
docs: Create an inventory for another wallet - allows sender to pay for recipient's inventory
This is used when transferring items to a wallet that doesn't have an inventory yet

accounts.name: payer
docs: The payer who funds the account creation (e.g., the sender in a transfer)

accounts.name: owner
docs: The owner of the new inventory (doesn't need to sign)

instructions.name: create_item_to_inventory
docs: Create a new item via loot roll AND add it to inventory in one transaction
This combines the items::create_item CPI with adding to inventory
NOTE: Uses manual reallocation to avoid CPI lamport accounting issues

accounts.name: item_account
docs: The PDA is [b"item", owner, item_id] under items program

accounts.name: loot_config
docs: Loot config for generating the item

instructions.name: create_item_to_inventory_cpi
docs: Session-aware version: create item and add to inventory
Uses session signer as payer, validates via session account
NOTE: Uses manual reallocation to avoid CPI lamport accounting issues

accounts.name: session_signer
docs: Session signer - pays for account creation

accounts.name: session
docs: Valid session linking session_key to authority

accounts.name: item_account
docs: The PDA is [b"item", authority, item_id] under items program

accounts.name: loot_config
docs: Loot config for generating the item

instructions.name: create_player
docs: Create a player. Optionally pass ClassConfig as remaining_account[0] to use on-chain actions.

instructions.name: create_player_with_inventory
docs: Create a player AND their inventory in one transaction
This is the preferred method for creating a wallet's first player

instructions.name: create_session
docs: Create a game session - allows a temporary keypair to act on behalf of the wallet authority
The session keypair can sign transactions without wallet approval popups
Parameters:
- duration_seconds: How long the session should last (max 24 hours = 86400 seconds)

accounts.name: session_key
docs: The temporary keypair that will sign transactions

accounts.name: player
docs: Any authority-owned player in the current state epoch (used for creation-time validation)

instructions.name: deposit_to_escrow
docs: Deposit SOL into the session escrow
These funds can be used to fund session keypairs and are always recoverable

instructions.name: equip_item_with_session
docs: Session-aware item equip.

instructions.name: extend_session
docs: Extend an existing session's expiry time

instructions.name: fund_session_from_escrow
docs: Fund a session keypair from the escrow
This transfers SOL from escrow PDA to the session signer
The session signer must sign to prove ownership of the keypair

accounts.name: authority
docs: The authority must sign to authorize the transfer

accounts.name: session_signer
docs: The session signer receives the funds

instructions.name: fund_session_signer_cpi
docs: Fund session signer from escrow via CPI (called by other programs)
Validates via session account instead of requiring authority signature

accounts.name: session_signer
docs: The session signer - must match session.session_key

accounts.name: session
docs: Valid session linking session_key to authority

accounts.name: escrow
docs: The escrow to fund from - must belong to session's authority

instructions.name: get_current_action
docs: Get the current action for the player

instructions.name: initialize_namespace_config
docs: Initialize the global player namespace configuration.
`state_epoch` is incorporated into new PDA seeds so future resets can
move to a new namespace without redeploying program IDs.

instructions.name: initialize_session_escrow
docs: Initialize a session escrow for the authority
This is a one-time setup that creates a PDA to hold session funds

instructions.name: recalculate_equipment_stats
docs: Recalculate all equipment stats by reading all equipped items
Useful for recovering from inconsistent state or after account migrations

accounts.name: item_account
docs: it will be destroyed; otherwise the inventory reference is pruned only.

instructions.name: remove_lowest_rarity_item_from_inventory_with_session
docs: Session-aware item removal for lowest-rarity junk items.
If valid, closes the item account via items program and returns rent to session escrow.

instructions.name: reset_action_slot
docs: Reset action slot to the beginning (called at start of battle or after combat ends)

instructions.name: return_session_funds_to_escrow
docs: Return unused SOL from session keypair back to escrow
Call this before ending a session to recover funds

accounts.name: session_signer
docs: The session signer must sign to authorize returning funds

accounts.name: escrow
docs: The escrow to return funds to

instructions.name: revoke_session
docs: Revoke a game session - ends the session early
Only the original authority can revoke

instructions.name: set_action_enabled
docs: Enable or disable an action slot
Enforces MAX_ENABLED_ACTIONS limit (currently 3)

instructions.name: set_state_epoch
docs: Update the active state epoch used for new account derivations.
Existing accounts remain valid but new creates land under a new namespace.

instructions.name: swap_action_slots
docs: Swap two action slots

accounts.name: item_account
docs: Item account to be transferred - validated but owned by items program

accounts.name: items_program
docs: The items program that owns ItemAccount

instructions.name: unequip_item_with_session
docs: Session-aware item unequip.

instructions.name: update_player_stats
docs: Owner-signed stat update, callable ONLY via CPI (not directly by users).
The dungeon program calls this to update stats after battles.

instructions.name: update_player_stats_cpi
docs: Update player stats via CPI - validates via session instead of owner signature

accounts.name: session
docs: Valid session linking session_key to authority

instructions.name: withdraw_from_escrow
docs: Withdraw SOL from the session escrow back to the authority
This is always possible - funds are never locked

errors.name: NameTooLong
errors.msg: Name must be 32 characters or less

errors.name: InvalidItemSlot
errors.msg: Item cannot be equipped to this slot - slot mismatch

errors.name: ItemNotOwnedBySender
errors.msg: Item is not owned by the sender

errors.name: ItemEquippedCannotTransfer
errors.msg: Cannot transfer an item while it is equipped

errors.name: PlayerIdAlreadyExists
errors.msg: Player ID already exists for this wallet

errors.name: ItemNotLowestRarity
errors.msg: Only lowest rarity items can be session-destroyed

errors.name: MaxActionsEnabled
errors.msg: Maximum number of actions already enabled (3)

errors.name: EmptyActionSlot
errors.msg: Cannot enable an empty action slot

errors.name: SameSlotSwap
errors.msg: Cannot swap a slot with itself

errors.name: PlayerPermanentlyDead
errors.msg: Player is permanently dead and cannot be revived

errors.name: PlayerMustBeDeadToClose
errors.msg: Only dead players can be closed

errors.name: PlayerHasEquippedItems
errors.msg: Cannot close player while items are equipped

errors.name: DirectCallNotAllowed
errors.msg: This instruction can only be called via CPI, not directly

types.name: Action
docs: An action that can be used in combat

types.name: ActionEffect
docs: Effects that can occur during combat from player actions

types.name: ActionSource
docs: Where an action comes from (innate class ability or equipment)

types.name: GameSession
docs: Game Session - allows temporary keypair to act on behalf of wallet authority
This enables auto-signing transactions without wallet approval popups

types.name: ItemSlot
docs: Equipment slots where items can be equipped

types.name: LootConfig
docs: Loot roll configuration - admin configurable

types.name: LootRollRequest
docs: Loot roll request parameters

types.name: PlayerClass
docs: Player character classes - determines abilities and stat growth

types.name: SessionEscrow
docs: Session Escrow - holds SOL that can be used to fund session keypairs
This is a PDA controlled by the authority, so funds are always recoverable
even if localStorage is lost (unlike the session keypair itself)
